summary.zh: 本版为 Kimi Coding 接入 Kimi K3；修好 Windows 上首次启动或更新激活时因杀软/索引短暂锁文件导致切换失败的问题；并保留你配置的模型 ID（尤其是 Kimi Coding），让需要推理回放的模型在工具调用与压缩后仍按统一协议续上。
summary.en: This release adds Kimi K3 for Kimi Coding; on Windows, artifact activation now retries directory swaps when antivirus or the indexer briefly locks freshly extracted files; configured model IDs (especially Kimi Coding) stay canonical, and reasoning-content replay follows centralized protocol contracts across tool loops and compaction.

summary.zh: Kimi Coding 提供方可选 Kimi K3（约 1M 上下文，支持推理）。
summary.en: Kimi Coding can select Kimi K3 (~1M context, reasoning-capable).

sources.title: fix(models): preserve selected ids and reasoning replay

title.zh: Windows 产物切换遇锁自动重试
title.en: Retry locked artifact directory swaps on Windows

summary.zh: 杀软或索引短暂占用刚解压文件时，切换会退避重试约 16 秒，不再一碰 EPERM 就启动失败。
summary.en: Transient EPERM/EACCES/EBUSY during the activation rename now backs off up to ~16s on Windows only.

sources.title: fix(desktop): retry artifact directory swap when Windows locks freshly extracted files

title.zh: 保留模型 ID 并统一推理回放
title.en: Keep model IDs and centralize reasoning replay

summary.zh: Kimi Coding 等配置 ID 不再被改写成别名；推理回放改走集中协议，工具轮与保留缓存的压缩更稳。
summary.en: Configured IDs stay canonical; reasoning replay uses shared protocol contracts across tool loops and cache-preserving compaction.

sources.title: fix(models): preserve selected ids and reasoning replay
